text.title: Gemini Multimodal: Images, Audio, PDFs, Combined
text.summary: Image, audio, and PDF upload patterns for the Gemini API; supported formats, size limits, and combined modality examples.

list.item: Images: JPG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC, HEIF — max 20MB — vision, OCR, analysis
Video: MP4, MPEG, MOV, AVI, FLV, MPG, WEBM, WMV, 3GPP — max 2GB — requires async polling
Audio: MP3, WAV, AIFF, AAC, OGG, FLAC — max 100MB — transcription, speaker ID, sentiment
PDFs: max 100MB — document Q&A, table/multi-column extraction
Code execution: Python sandbox only, no internet, ~30s execution limit

example.code:
import PIL.Image import google.generativeai as genai
genai.configure(api_key="YOUR_API_KEY") model = genai.GenerativeModel("gemini-2.0-flash")
# From PIL image = PIL.Image.open("photo.jpg") response = model.generate_content(["Describe this image in detail", image])
# Multiple images for comparison img1 = PIL.Image.open("before.jpg") img2 = PIL.Image.open("after.jpg") response = model.generate_content(["Compare these images and describe differences", img1, img2])

import time audio_file = genai.upload_file("podcast.mp3") while audio_file.state.name == "PROCESSING": time.sleep(5) audio_file = genai.get_file(audio_file.name)
model = genai.GenerativeModel("gemini-1.5-pro") response = model.generate_content(["Transcribe this audio recording", audio_file]) # Also useful: speaker identification, sentiment, topic extraction

pdf_file = genai.upload_file("document.pdf") model = genai.GenerativeModel("gemini-1.5-pro")
# Structured extraction response = model.generate_content([ """Extract the following in JSON: {"party_names": [...], "contract_value": ..., "key_dates": [...], "payment_terms": "..."}""", pdf_file ])
example.note: Gemini handles tables, images, and multi-column layouts natively — no custom PDF parser needed.

example.code: # Video + PDF cross-reference video_file = genai.upload_file("presentation.mp4") pdf_file = genai.upload_file("slides.pdf") response = model.generate_content([ "Compare the video presentation with the PDF slides. Note any discrepancies.", video_file, pdf_file ])

rule.statement: Store uploaded file names with timestamps; re-upload if older than 48 hours — Gemini files expire after 48 hours.
rule.rationale: File upload is not idempotent; uploading the same file twice creates two separate file objects, doubling storage cost.
